name: Zucchini Bread #13
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp vital wheat gluten (or 3 tbsp to 2 1/2 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zucchini and measure out the remaining ingredients as specified.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
4. Bake on medium heat for the time specified by the manufacturer's directions.
5. Allow to cool before removing from the pan.
